watch: Direct hands-on reproduction of the @-mention mechanic by a registered source, to move past documentation-relay corroboration

cycle_3_2026-07-11_update: Actioned the opt-in watch item, but overtaken by a bigger fact: Meta fully removed the Muse Image @-mention feature on 10 July 2026 (3 days post-launch), not converted it to opt-in. Verified via TheWrap, Deadline (independent Tier-2/candidate outlets, not yet registered -- flagged in source_candidates.json), plus Meta's own spokesperson statement ('missed the mark'). Added as a new confirmed claim + Update section to EN/TR articles, 6 web searches/fetches used.
